babyDevelopment: You're at the halfway point! The baby is starting to swallow amniotic fluid, which helps the digestive system develop. The baby is also producing meconium (the first stool) in the intestines. All major organs are being screened during the anatomy ultrasound.
bodyChanges: Your navel might become an 'outie' as your uterus reaches your belly button level. You may feel more energetic as you've crossed the halfway mark. Sleep positions should strictly be on your side now.
tips: Schedule your anatomy scan if you haven't yet
Shop for maternity essentials if needed
Start thinking about your birth plan

do: Sleep on your left side to maximize blood flow
Stay active with moderate daily movement
Eat calcium-rich foods for baby's bone growth
dont: Sleep on your back for extended periods

travelAdvisory.note: Halfway there! A great time for a relaxing vacation.

milestoneDescription: You've reached 20 weeks—halfway through your pregnancy journey!
